blended.narrative: Hogadon is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,575 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 48°F, winds around 24 mph.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 19".
